positive: A stylized, vibrant geometric floral arrangement inspired by Art Deco and retro mid-century aesthetics. The composition is highly symmetrical and contained within a central wreath or border format. Main elements include stylized jungle leaves (monstera, palm), abstract floral patterns, and sharp geometric accents, rendered in a limited but vivid color palette of teal, burnt orange, creamy yellow, and deep emerald green. The style must be clean, bold, high-contrast vector illustration suitable for textile printing, resembling screen print artwork. Excellent flat graphic design quality, with defined outlines and clear color separation. Minimal shading, emphasizing silhouette and pattern.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, debris, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, low detail, photorealistic, 3d render, oil paint
